seoTitle: Eastern Heights vs Eaton — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Eastern Heights and Eaton. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Eastern Heights vs Eaton: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Eastern Heights and Eaton.
heading: Eastern Heights vs Eaton — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Eastern Heights, Queensland and Eaton, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Eaton has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Eastern Heights (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Eastern Heights or Eaton safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Eastern Heights has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Eaton scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Eastern Heights scores 46/100 for bushfire risk. Eaton scores 45/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Eastern Heights or Eaton?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Eaton has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.47% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
